speaker: Command
message: Engine 1 here Command. Report current fire conditions near the structure. Listening

speaker: Engine 1
message: Command here Engine 1. Two vehicles fully involved near the sidewalk with heavy smoke moving toward the multi-story building. Finished

speaker: Rescue 2
message: Command here Rescue 2. Two civilians located near the sidewalk at safe distance from the burning vehicles. No confirmed injuries observed. Finished

speaker: Command
message: Engine 1 here Command. Prioritize suppression on the burning vehicles and protect the adjacent parked vehicles. Listening

speaker: Engine 1
message: Command here Engine 1. Affirmative, suppression line operating on the vehicle fire. Three parked vehicles remain exposed. Finished

speaker: Engine 1
message: Rescue 2 here Engine 1. Confirm civilians remain clear of the smoke and vehicle hazard area. Listening

speaker: Rescue 2
message: Engine 1 here Rescue 2. Confirmed, civilians remain near the sidewalk at safe distance from the burning vehicles. Finished

speaker: Engine 1
message: Command here Engine 1. Fire intensity reduced on one vehicle. Second vehicle still actively burning. Finished

speaker: Command
message: Engine 1 here Command. Continue suppression on the second vehicle and maintain exposure protection. Finished
